evidence_records.raw_value: Reuters: Photos from NATO summit, The Hague — Zelenskyy in dark blazer, white shirt, dark trousers. Multiple angles confirm change from military-green attire.
evidence_records.notes: Named resolution source. Published 8 days prior. Photos widely circulated.

evidence_records.raw_value: AP: 'Zelenskyy arrives at NATO leaders' session in formal attire, marking a departure from his wartime look.'
evidence_records.notes: Named resolution source. AP uses 'formal attire' phrasing.

evidence_records.raw_value: YES token at $0.65. Market divided — debate on whether 'blazer + trousers' meets the market's 'matching jacket and trousers ensemble' definition.
evidence_records.notes: Market showing uncertainty despite photo evidence. Whale selling pressure on YES side.
